top.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
top.summary: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

top.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war
top.summary: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.

top.title: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
top.summary: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.

top.title: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
top.summary: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, this issue "crept in subtly".

top.title: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
top.summary: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.

top.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
top.summary: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

title.#text: How to win — and lose — Decoder
Samsung says the RAM shortage could get even worse next year
The Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum have been turned into retrofuturistic handhelds
